mapper.select: SELECT c.*, d.department_name FROM class c LEFT JOIN department d ON c.department_id = d.department_id WHERE c.class_id = #{classId}
SELECT c.*, d.department_name FROM class c LEFT JOIN department d ON c.department_id = d.department_id WHERE c.class_code = #{classCode}
SELECT c.*, d.department_name FROM class c LEFT JOIN department d ON c.department_id = d.department_id ORDER BY c.create_time DESC

SELECT c.*, d.department_name FROM class c LEFT JOIN department d ON c.department_id = d.department_id
AND (c.class_name LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%') OR c.class_code LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%') OR d.department_name LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%'))
AND c.department_id = #{departmentId}
ORDER BY c.create_time DESC
SELECT c.*, d.department_name FROM class c LEFT JOIN department d ON c.department_id = d.department_id WHERE c.department_id = #{departmentId} ORDER BY c.create_time DESC
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO class (class_name, class_code, department_id, grade, student_count) VALUES (#{className}, #{classCode}, #{departmentId}, #{grade}, #{studentCount})
mapper.update: UPDATE class SET student_count = #{count} WHERE class_id = #{classId}
